disclosure_items.clinical_fact: High-energy blunt trauma — fall of approximately 3 metres from a ladder onto the right side about 15 minutes ago
trigger_question_examples: What happened just before this started?
How far did he fall and how did he land?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He was up a ladder and fell about 3 metres, landing on his right side. It was maybe 15 minutes ago.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe air hunger — unable to speak more than a word or two before running out of breath
trigger_question_examples: Is he able to talk in full sentences?
How hard is he working to breathe?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's gasping and can only get one or two words out — he can't catch his breath at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Central cyanosis reported by bystander — lips and face have turned blue
trigger_question_examples: What colour are his lips and face?
Does he look blue or grey?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: His lips and face have gone completely blue.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Rapidly deteriorating conscious state — became confused and agitated, now drifting toward unconsciousness
trigger_question_examples: Has his level of awareness changed?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He was really agitated and confused, and now he's starting to slip out of it — he's barely responding.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe sharp right-sided chest pain, worse on inspiration
trigger_question_examples: Does it hurt more when he tries to breathe in?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's holding the right side of his chest and says it's sharp and awful, and worse when he tries to breathe in.
